items.name_en: Dior 1:1 Authentic Counter Top Imported Original Sheepskin Backpack, Medium Dior Caro Backpack Black Sheepskin Oversized Houndstooth
items.name_cn:
Dior 1:1 Authentic Counter Top Imported Original Sheepskin Backpack, Medium Dior Caro Backpack Black Sheepskin Oversized Houndstooth
Product Info
This Dior Caro Backpack is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer Collection, showcasing a fashionable and elegant style. Crafted from black sheepskin, it features oversized houndstooth quilting for a touch of class. The flap is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD logo. Inside, there is a spacious drawstring main compartment, and two small flap pockets for various daily essentials. The medium size comes with gold-finish handles and an adjustable shoulder strap for added comfort.
Main: Sheepskin, Lining: Cowhide
Front features CD logo flap and drawstring closure
Dimensions: 23×26.7×12.5cm
Style No.: 6301

items.name_en: 💖 Comes with a complete set of original green box packaging 💖 [New] Ophidia Series Mini Backpack. The Ophidia series blends Gucci's traditional heritage with modern design to present a striking new piece. This backpack is crafted from beige and white GG Supreme canvas, featuring a classic webbing design that infuses the brand's essence. An adjustable shoulder strap adds a modern touch. Beige and white GG Supreme canvas, oatmeal leather trim, gold-tone hardware, red and green striped webbing, brown cotton-linen lining, double G handles. Height: 6cm, adjustable leather shoulder strap (length adjustable between 31cm and 35cm). Weight: approx. 0.55kg.

Height: 6cm, adjustable leather shoulder strap (length adjustable between 31cm and 35cm). Weight: approx. 0.55kg.
Model: 795221.
Dimensions: 20.5(W) x 20(H) x 12cm(D)
Color: Oatmeal/pvc.
Max Capacity: iPhone Plus, wallet, Airpods headphones, and lipstick

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】GG Extra Mini Bag
items.name_cn:
💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】GG Extra Mini Bag
A shoulder bag from the Early Autumn Selection series, perfect for creating daily looks. Practical items are reinterpreted with a modern aesthetic philosophy, adorned with the classic interlocking G pattern. This extra mini bag is crafted in beige and blue classic GG canvas and leather, featuring an open pocket and an adjustable shoulder strap.
Beige and blue classic GG canvas and leather
Silver-tone hardware
Classic GG canvas lining
Exterior: one open pocket
Removable adjustable shoulder strap (55cm long)
Magnetic snap closure
Weight: approx. 0.47kg
Made in Italy
Model: 795213
Dimensions: 13(L) x 20(W) x 5cm(H)
Color: Blue canvas/Original leather
Made in Italy

items.name_en: (With full packaging)!!️Ophidia Series Small Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
(With full packaging)!!️Ophidia Series Small Shoulder Bag
This Ophidia series shoulder bag is crafted from GG Supreme canvas, injecting new life into a classic design. The bag comes with two removable shoulder straps, one chain and one leather, and is adorned with classic striped webbing elements and double G hardware. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, oatmeal leather trim, gold-tone hardware, red and green striped webbing, beige cotton-linen lining with double G, removable chain shoulder strap (22cm long); removable adjustable leather shoulder strap (length adjustable between 50cm and 57cm) Zipper closure.
Model: 795194
Dimensions: 24✖️12✖️12cm
Color: Oatmeal/pvc
